No proof of service for Petition or the Motion on file. Also, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and Court's October 1, 2015 minute order requiring compliance. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS PANOUTSOPOULOS et al VS. THE KARSANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 2, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT ANDREW ZACKS, ZACKS & FREEDMAN, P.C. MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED. As Pasternack v. McCullough (2015) 235 Cal.App.4th 1347, aptly states, "a malicious prosecution plaintiff should be required to simply wait until it obtains a favorable termination in the entire underlying action" to avoid the "virtual certain[ty]" of creating apparent conflicts of attorney interest. Defendants have yet to move for attorneys' fees and costs. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS PANOUTSOPOULOS et al VS. THE KARSANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 2, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT THE KARSANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, PETER KARSANT Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike DENIED. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS PANOUTSOPOULOS et al VS. THE KARSANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 2, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT THE KARSANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, PETER KARSANT DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. As pleaded, the core issue is identical to one already adjudicated in 2013 by Judge Kramer. See DKN Holdings, LLC v. Faerber (2015) 61 Cal. 4th 813, 818-19. Under claim preclusion, facts may differ; it is the issue that must be identical. The demurrer is otherwise OVERRULED. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW RIBOTTO et al VS. GRAYSTONE PARTNERS LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion Of Graystone Partners, Lps Motion For Summary Adjudication, Or In The Alternative Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 2, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT GRAYSTONE PARTNERS LP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion Of Graystone Partners, Lps Motion For Summary Adjudication, Or In The Alternative Summary Judgment DENIED. Triable issues exist as to Material Fact Nos. 14, 15, 18, 19 and 25. Additionally, the Unruh Act is not limited to registered domestic partners; it "may also protect the rights of other unmarried couples." Koebke v. Bernardo Heights Country Club (2005) 36 Cal.4th 824, 831. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN WONG VS. NICK LANHAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff John Wong'S Motion For Order Compelling Defendants Nick Lanham, Ed Koster, And Jennifer Komm To Respond To Form Interrogatories, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 2, 2015, line 5. Plaintiff John Wong'S Motion For Order Compelling Defendants Nick Lanham, Ed Koster, And Jennifer Komm To Respond To Form Interrogatories, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. Absent a stay (as in Terminals Equip., 221 CA3d 234, cited by defendants), pendency of a demurrer is not grounds for failing to respond to discovery. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Responses to Form Interrogatories is therefore GRANTED as to defendants Lanham, Koster and Komm. Per CCP 2030.290, all objections are waived. No sanctions. = (501/RBU)
